title: HydroPal Vacuum Insulated Water Bottle 1200ml/1000ml/750ml/500ml, 2 Lids (Straw & Spout), 12H Hot 24H Cold, BPA Free Stainless Steel Bottle, Leakproof Sports Water Bottle for Gym, Travel, Work
features: ❅18/8 Food Grade Stainless Steel: All our water bottles are made from high-grade, non-toxic, BPA free18/8 stainless steel that never rusts or imparts a metallic taste. The outside layer is anti-slip for easy grip.

❅Insulated Sports Water Bottle: Perfectly vacuum sealed with double wall insulation which makes the water bottle sweat-free! It keeps your drink COLD for up to 24 hours, and HOT for up to 12 hours. And the wide-mouth design is easy to clean and fill with ice cubes.

❅2 Lids: YES, HydroPal comes with TWO different 100% leakproof lids to fit your every need. The carabiner straw Lid allows you to enjoy spill-proof sipping without effort. A spout lid with a screw cap allows fast water flow when you feel the burn.

❅Ideal Gift Choice: Our line of insulated hydration solutions comes in 650ml to 1200ml sizes with a variety of colors. Whether your family and friends are into fitness, working, or traveling, they will all love your gift idea!
❅What You Get: 1 x HydroPal water bottle, 2 x lids, 2 x straws, 1 x straw brush, 1 x packing box.
